phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso principale per il museo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH leen-GRES-soh preen-chee-PAH-leh per eel moo-ZEH-oh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: In front of you, on the left.
responses.phonetic: DEE FROHN-teh AH LEH-ee AH see-NEE-strah
responses.french: Di fronte a lei, a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude la cupola oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh lah KOO-poh-lah OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, è necessario prenotare per l'ascensore panoramico, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eh neh-ches-SAHR-eeoh preh-noh-TAH-reh per lah-sheen-SOH-reh pah-noh-RAH-mee-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the top of the Mole
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si sale in cima alla Mole Antonelliana?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see SAH-leh een CHEE-mah AL-lah MOH-leh an-toh-nel-LYAH-nah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Mole Antonelliana houses Turin's National Museum of Cinema; its panoramic lift offers views of the Alps on clear days.

responses.english: By the panoramic lift inside the Cinema Museum.
responses.phonetic: kon eel pah-noh-RAH-meek lift al-leen-TER-noh del moo-ZEH-oh del CHEE-neh-mah.
responses.french: Con il panoramic lift all'interno del Museo del Cinema.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Museum of Cinema inside contains
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, cosa si trova nel Museo del Cinema?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-zah see TROH-vah nel moo-ZEH-oh del CHEE-neh-mah?

responses.english: Historic cinema equipment, reconstructed sets and screenings.
responses.phonetic: at-tret-tsah-TOO-rah chee-neh-mah-toh-GRAH-fee-kah STOH-ree-kah, set ree-kos-TWEE-tee eh proh-yeh-TSYOH-nee.
responses.french: Attrezzatura cinematografica storica, set ricostruiti e proiezioni.
